description_long: This is a female adult figure dressed in a strapless, knee-length dress with long gloves that extend above the elbows. The figure has a voluminous, wavy hairstyle that frames the face and extends to the shoulders. She is wearing high-heeled shoes and stands in a neutral pose with arms extended horizontally to the sides. The dress is form-fitting at the top and flares slightly at the skirt, while the gloves and shoes add a formal, elegant touch. The facial features are stylized, and the overall appearance suggests a classic, possibly vintage, fashion aesthetic. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure's posture is upright and balanced.
description: A female adult in a strapless dress, long gloves, and high heels, with wavy shoulder-length hair and an upright, formal stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the strapless dress, long gloves, high heels, and wavy hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, the arm extended in a T-pose, and the layered hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the gloves, and the full volume of the wavy hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the dress, the arm in a T-pose, and the hairstyle's layers.
attribute_clothing_type: strapless knee-length dress with long formal gloves
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
